Prey for the Devil (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,802,293Details
International Box Office $24,211,452
Worldwide Box Office $44,013,745
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $404,045
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $871,304
Total $1,275,349
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Sister Ann believes she is answering a calling to be the first female exorcist… but who, or what, called her? In response to a global rise in demonic possessions, Ann seeks out a place at an exorcism school reopened by the Catholic Church. Until now these schools have only trained priests in the Rite of Exorcism — but a professor recognizes Sister Ann’s gifts and agrees to train her. Thrust onto the spiritual frontline with fellow student Father Dante, Sister Ann finds herself in a battle for the soul of a young girl, who Sister Ann believes is possessed by the same demon that tormented her own mother years ago. Determined to root out the evil, Ann soon realizes the Devil has her right where he wants her.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,185,126 (36.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,980 opening theaters/2,980 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,491,498

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 28th, 2022 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: October 27th, 2022 (Wide) (Ecuador)
October 27th, 2022 (Wide) (Qatar)
October 27th, 2022 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
October 27th, 2022 (Wide) (Lebanon)
October 27th, 2022 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: December 13th, 2022 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violent and disturbing content, terror, thematic elements and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2693 (cert #53259), 8/11/2021)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Posthumous Release
Plot point: Demons, Exorcism, Monks and Nuns, Possessed, Religious, Woman in a Male Dominated Profession
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Gold Circle Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Sister Ann believes she is answering a calling to be the first female exorcist… but who, or what, called her? In response to a global rise in demonic possessions, Ann seeks out a place at an exorcism school reopened by the Catholic Church. Until now these schools have only trained priests in the Rite of Exorcism — but a professor recognizes Sister Ann’s gifts and agrees to train her. Thrust onto the spiritual frontline with fellow student Father Dante, Sister Ann finds herself in a battle for the soul of a young girl, who Sister Ann believes is possessed by the same demon that tormented her own mother years ago. Determined to root out the evil, Ann soon realizes the Devil has her right where he wants her.
